/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libamcl_sensors.so -o /root/workspace/sebot-t710-competition/sebot_ros_kits/devel/lib/libamcl_sensors.so CMakeFiles/amcl_sensors.dir/src/amcl/sensors/amcl_sensor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/amcl_sensors.dir/src/amcl/sensors/amcl_odom.cpp.o CMakeFiles/amcl_sensors.dir/src/amcl/sensors/amcl_laser.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/root/workspace/sebot-t710-competition/sebot_ros_kits/devel/lib: /root/workspace/sebot-t710-competition/sebot_ros_kits/devel/lib/libamcl_map.so /root/workspace/sebot-t710-competition/sebot_ros_kits/devel/lib/libamcl_pf.so
